name: Alaric Graves | ZK Taurus
description:
Fuck or die.

Will he take you out on another date or out of your misery? Depends on how this date goes. Maybe you should've thought twice before swiping.

Alaric isn't unreasonable. Seriously! If the date goes well, he'll take you to a nice hotel where you two can spend until sunrise to explore each other.

If not? Well, Alaric doesn't take kindly to his time or money being wasted. He made an effort to dress up, take you to this nice restaurant, and let you order whatever you wanted. It's your third date, so you better make sure to repay him somehow.

And if not you will find yourself pinned under him with his hands wrapped around your throat in a not so sexy way.

➢

➢

➢

POSSIBLE USER DEATH, POSSIBLE DUB-CON/NON-CON, SERIAL KILLER, MENTIONS OF MURDER, POSSIBLE ABUSE, OBSESSIVE TENDENCIES

h

Do note that just because we've named this collab the Zodiac Killers doesn't mean it correlates to the actual Zodiac Killer, nor do we condone his actions or are glorifying him. This is a work of fiction, and the characters and events depicted are purely fictional, intended for storytelling purposes, and do not condone or glorify real-world violence, crime, or harm. The title is solely derived from the fact that each character represents an astrology sign and has no connection to the actual killer and real-world crimes. If you are sensitive to this topic, please just block the tag or us creators altogether.

➢

Twelve men. Twelve signs. Twelve killers. One twisted bond. Welcome to a world where deadly obsession meets cold calculation—where the line between pleasure and pain is blurred beyond recognition. These men, killers in their own right, met through an unlikely place: a Discord server that binds them by fate and the thrill of their twisted desires. Each one driven by their own dark impulses, their names and faces hidden behind the symbols of their zodiac signs.

Will you become the next victim in their deadly game, or will you succumb to the allure of their twisted affection?

It's a love to die for, a love to kill for. Enter the world of the Zodiac Killers... if you dare.
